items.sub: Reading, writing, grammar and expression. Individual sessions adapted to your child's level, led by a qualified tutor.

items.title: English Tutoring — Primary School

items.title: Math Tutoring — Primary School
items.sub: Operations, fractions, word problems and logical reasoning. We start from the fundamentals and build solidly so your child follows and understands in class.

items.title: English Communication — Ages 7 to 14

qaSection.label: Program 1 — Testing & Development
qaSection.title: AI-Powered QA Engineering
qaSection.sub: Three weekends. Hands-on modules. A job-ready portfolio. Everything a QA employer wants to see — built by you, guided by an expert.

features.label: Why Nexo Skills
features.title: The training we wished existed
features.sub: No outdated theory, no disconnected instructors. Active professionals, real tools, and measurable outcomes — starting from the very first weekend.

items.title: AI at the core of every program
items.description: AI isn't an optional module added at the end of the course. From day one, you use the tools today's professionals rely on — ChatGPT, Copilot, automation — not practices from five years ago.

items.title: Practitioners, not professors
items.description: Every trainer actively works in their field. They bring real examples, lived mistakes, and a market perspective no textbook can provide.

items.title: Zero fluff — 100% hands-on
items.description: Every hour of training produces something: a test written, a site deployed, a report drafted. You leave with concrete deliverables, not lecture notes.

items.title: Official certificate included
items.description: Every program ends with a recognized certificate of completion — tangible proof of your skills that belongs on your CV and LinkedIn profile.

items.title: Career support after graduation
items.description: CV review, mock interviews, LinkedIn makeover — we stay with you beyond the certificate, all the way to your next role.

program.label: The Curriculum
program.title: 3 weekends. One career change.
program.sub: A focused, progressive curriculum that takes you from the basics of software testing to AI-powered techniques — and ends with a job-ready portfolio and interview prep. Dates to be confirmed.

modules.title: QA Fundamentals
modules.description: Understand how software is built and how it breaks. You'll master the SDLC, testing types, bug lifecycle, test case design, and how to write bug reports that developers actually act on.

modules.title: AI Essentials for Testers
modules.description: Understand what AI actually is — not the hype, the reality. Learn how large language models work, why they matter for QA, and how to start using ChatGPT as a professional tool, not a toy.

modules.title: AI-Assisted Testing in Practice
modules.description: Put AI to work on real testing tasks. Generate test cases in seconds, write test plans from requirements, spot edge cases you would have missed, and cut your exploratory testing time in half.

modules.title: Career Launch
modules.description: Build a portfolio that shows employers you can hit the ground running. We review your CV, optimize your LinkedIn, run live mock interviews, and coach you on how to stand out in a competitive QA job market.

pricing.label: Investment — AI & QA Program · Dates TBD
pricing.title: One price. Everything included.
pricing.sub: No upsells. No extras. One payment covers the full program, all materials, career support, and your certificate.
included: Taught by a Canadian QA Expert
Real project portfolio you keep forever
pricing.guarantee: Not satisfied in the first 30 days? Full refund. No questions, no forms.

isoSection.label: Program 2 — Quality Management
isoSection.title: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
isoSection.sub: The standard that governs quality in over 1 million organizations worldwide — finally taught the way practitioners actually need it.
isoSection.description: ISO 9001 isn't just a certificate on the wall. It's a management system that, when implemented correctly, transforms how an organization operates. This program gives you the knowledge to build it, audit it, and defend it — whether you're implementing from scratch or preparing for external certification.

modules.title: Organizational Context & Leadership
modules.description: Map your organization's environment, identify internal and external stakeholders, define the scope of your QMS, and understand what leadership commitment actually looks like in practice.

modules.title: Planning & Risk-Based Thinking
modules.description: Learn to think in terms of risks and opportunities — not just problems and solutions. Set measurable quality objectives and build action plans that connect strategy to daily operations.

modules.title: Support, Resources & Operations
modules.description: Understand what resources the standard requires — people, infrastructure, knowledge — and how to document your processes in a way that is useful, not just compliant.

modules.title: Performance Evaluation & Continual Improvement
modules.description: Close the loop: monitor what matters, run effective internal audits, conduct meaningful management reviews, and build a culture of continuous improvement that lasts beyond certification day.

isoSection.audience_label: This program is for you if…
audience: You are a quality manager or coordinator responsible for certification
You manage operations or processes and want to understand the standard
You are preparing your organization for its first ISO 9001 audit
You are a consultant or internal auditor wanting a structured foundation

webSection.label: Program 3 — Digital Skills
webSection.title: Build Your Website with AI — No Code Required
webSection.sub: You have an idea, a business, or a brand that deserves an online presence. This weekend changes that.
webSection.practical: No slides, no theory, no homework. Every exercise is done live — you work, we guide. By the end of the weekend, your site is live and your name is on it.

modules.title: Define Your Site, Your Message, Your Offer
modules.description: Before you build anything, you need to know what your site needs to say. Use ChatGPT to clarify your positioning, write compelling copy, define your audience, and map out your pages — in under two hours.

modules.title: Design a Full Website with AI — No Code
modules.description: Generate complete, professional pages using v0.dev and Bolt.new. Adjust layout, colors and content through natural language — no CSS, no HTML, no frustration.

modules.title: Launch It — Domain, Hosting, SEO
modules.description: Connect your domain, deploy your site live, and set up the SEO basics that help people find you. You'll end the day with a real URL you can actually share.

modules.title: Own It — Update, Track, Grow
modules.description: A website is only useful if you can keep it current. Learn how to update your content with AI, read your analytics, add contact forms, and evolve your site as your needs change — all on your own.

audience: Entrepreneurs and freelancers without an online presence
Small business owners with an outdated or nonexistent website
Coaches, consultants and creators building their personal brand
Professionals who tried website builders and gave up in frustration
Anyone who has been putting this off because it felt too complicated
webSection.outcome: You will leave with a live, professional website that looks like it cost thousands — built by you in a single weekend, powered by AI, and ready to represent your business from day one.

testimonials.label: Student Stories
testimonials.title: They did it. You can too.

items.name: Amira Slimani
items.quote: I had zero tech background before this program. Nine weeks later I had a job offer. The AI module wasn't just useful — it made me stand out in every interview. I still use those skills every single day.

items.name: Youssef Benali
items.quote: I had the skills but my CV wasn't telling the story. After the career session, I rewrote everything. One week later: three interview requests. The coaching alone justified the $297.

items.name: Fatima Lahlou
items.quote: I spent months on free YouTube tutorials going in circles. This program gave me a clear path, someone to answer my questions, and a portfolio I was actually proud to show. That changes everything.

items.name: Karim Mansouri
items.quote: The ISO 9001 training was exactly what I needed to prepare for our certification audit. The practical case studies and tools provided helped me structure our quality approach in just a few weeks.

items.name: Inès Guerrouche
items.quote: I took the 'Build your website' course on a Saturday morning and by Sunday evening my first site was live. The instructor explains everything clearly without unnecessary jargon. Exactly what I needed to get started.

items.name: Mehdi Aouad
items.quote: The Quality Auditor program gave me a complete view of real-world audits. The practical scenarios closely mirror actual workplace situations. I'd highly recommend it to anyone preparing for certification.

modalities.title: How do our programs work?
modalities.sub: Flexible formats designed to fit your schedule and learning style.

items.title: Intensive weekend
items.description: Concentrated sessions over 1–3 weekends so you can learn without leaving your job.

items.title: Live online
items.description: Real-time virtual classes with your instructor — from anywhere.

items.title: Individual tutoring

items.title: Career coaching
items.description: CV review, LinkedIn, mock interviews — support all the way to your goal.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: A training school built by practitioners, for practitioners.
about.description: Nexo Skills was born from a simple observation: too many programs teach outdated theory with no connection to real-world practice. We wanted to do things differently — instructors who work in their field today, content that reflects current practices, and support that goes all the way to employment.

items.q: What level do I need to join?
items.a: No prior experience required for most programs. QA Engineering and Website programs start from zero. ISO and Auditor programs don't require a technical background, but some familiarity with business operations is helpful.
All programs are delivered live online via video conference. You attend from anywhere — all you need is a computer and a stable internet connection.
Groups are capped at 12 participants so every student gets direct attention from the trainer.

items.q: Is the certificate recognized by employers?
items.a: Our certificate is issued by Nexo Skills and documents that you completed the full program. It is not a government-accredited diploma, but it is valued by employers who prioritize practical skills over formal credentials.
Yes. For the QA Engineering program ($297), you can split the payment into 3 monthly installments of $99. Email us at info@nexo-skills.com to arrange it.

items.q: What if I miss a session?
items.a: All sessions are recorded and shared with enrolled participants. You can catch up on any missed session via the recording at any time.

items.q: What language are courses taught in?
items.a: Courses are taught in French. All written materials are available in both French and English.

items.q: How quickly will I hear back after registering?
items.a: You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours. For questions before that, email us at info@nexo-skills.com — we typically reply within a few hours.

success.title: You're in. Welcome to Nexo Skills.
success.sub: Your spot is confirmed. We're glad you made the move.
success.body: Check your inbox — a confirmation email with everything you need is on its way. If you have any questions before we start, just reply to that email. We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

a11y.title: Web Accessibility & Testing Tools
a11y.tagline: Learn to build and audit inclusive websites with the tools professionals actually use.

highlights.title: WCAG 2.1 compliance
highlights.text: Master the accessibility criteria that apply to public websites and businesses.

highlights.title: Industry tools
highlights.text: Axe, Lighthouse, NVDA, VoiceOver — you actually use them during the training.

highlights.title: Immediately applicable
highlights.text: Leave with an audit checklist and the skills to apply it on any website right away.

modules.title: Understanding Web Accessibility
modules.description: The 4 WCAG principles, A/AA/AAA levels, and legal requirements.

modules.title: The Most Common Barriers
modules.description: Missing alt text, insufficient contrast, broken keyboard navigation, inaccessible forms.

modules.title: Audit Tools in Practice
modules.description: Axe DevTools, Lighthouse, screen readers (NVDA/VoiceOver) — used on real sites during training.

modules.title: Conducting an Accessibility Audit
modules.description: Plan and perform a full audit, write an actionable report and prioritize fixes.

audience: Front-end developers who want to master accessibility
QA testers who audit web applications
Project managers overseeing digital products
Anyone working on public websites subject to accessibility laws

audit.title: ISO 9001 Internal Auditor
audit.tagline: Plan, conduct and close effective internal audits — and write findings that drive real improvement.

highlights.title: Proven methodology
highlights.text: The same method used by certified auditors — adapted to be practical from day one.

highlights.title: Real role-play exercises
highlights.text: Practice audit interviews, finding writing and debriefs under real conditions.

highlights.title: Ready for auditing
highlights.text: You leave with the skills to conduct audits as part of an ISO 9001 program.

modules.title: ISO 9001 & Audit Context
modules.description: The standard's requirements related to internal audits, the auditor's role and success conditions.

modules.title: Audit Preparation
modules.description: Audit plan, checklists, document review, communication with the auditee — everything done before.

modules.title: Conducting the Audit
modules.description: Interview techniques, collecting objective evidence, identifying and qualifying nonconformities.

modules.title: Closing Meeting & Audit Report
modules.description: Closing meeting, report writing, corrective action follow-up.

audience: You're part of a quality team and need to conduct internal audits
You're a quality manager responsible for the annual audit program
You're preparing your organization for ISO 9001 certification
You've completed the ISO 9001 training and want to move to practice

anglais-vacances-ete.title: Summer Pack — English Communication (Ages 7-14)
anglais-vacances-ete.tagline: 8 weeks for your child to speak up, present confidently, and gain real fluency in English — in a small group of 4, online, twice a week.

highlights.title: Small group of 4
highlights.text: Every child speaks at every session. Not 1 in 30 — 1 in 4, with the tutor's full attention throughout.

highlights.title: Communication first
highlights.text: We learn to introduce yourself, tell a story, explain ideas, give an opinion. Real spoken skills — not just grammar rules.

highlights.title: Perfect for summer
highlights.text: 2 sessions of 1h30 per week — enough to make real progress without taking over your child's whole summer.

modules.title: Introducing yourself & talking about yourself
modules.description: Name, age, family, hobbies, country. Role-plays, pair dialogues, first speaking habits.

modules.title: My daily life in English
modules.description: Describing your day, summer activities, preferences. Vocabulary for free time, sport and music.

modules.title: Telling stories & explaining ideas
modules.description: How to tell an event or explain a simple idea in English. Work on fluency, connectors and sentence flow.

modules.title: Presenting in front of the group
modules.description: 2-3 minute mini-presentations on a topic chosen by each child. Kind, constructive feedback from the tutor and peers.

audience: Your child is between 7 and 14 and wants to improve their spoken English
They understand a little but hesitate to speak or lack confidence
You're looking for an enriching, structured summer activity
You want them to go back to school in September more comfortable in English class
You prefer a warm small group over a large impersonal classroom
